ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-10-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Daniel Conrad and Elizabeth Hanowsky for Edward Kersh.

Mr. Conrad explained circumstances and work performed/services provided to support the request for extraordinary fees. The Petition to Approve Waiver of Account, etc. was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Jones. (Not Reported)
